title: juncus cyperoides
intro: Juncus cyperoides, also known as Rush or Cumbungi, is a perennial aquatic plant belonging to the family Juncaceae. It has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which help to soothe skin irritations and wounds, and treat conditions such as eczema and acne. The health benefits of Juncus cyperoides include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, as well as treating respiratory issues and digestive problems. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and poultices, which can be applied topically or ingested to reap its medicinal benefits.
